reviews.comment:
Cómo siempre en todos los ACA que estuve  muy buena atención, es chico (no es queja, solo comentario), limpio tanto en la playa y en los baños.

(Translated by Google)
As always at all the ACAs I've been to, the service was very good. It's small (not a complaint, just a comment), and clean both on the beach and in the bathrooms.
